DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token
style
pattern

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) v0.1

A standard, machine-readable format for design system documentation covering components, design tokens, styles, and patterns. This is the root schema; definitions are organized into directories: common/ (rich-text, metadata, status, link, extensions, example, guideline, usecase, accessibility, artifact-reference), components/ (component, anatomy, api, design-specifications, variant, state), tokens/ (token), style/ (style), and patterns/ (pattern).

Source: dsds.schema.json

collectionDoc

A collection of multiple documentation artifacts.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredHuman-readable name of the collection.
componentscomponentDoc[]at least oneArray of component documentation objects.
tokenstokenDoc[]at least oneArray of token documentation objects.
tokenGroupstokenGroupDoc[]at least oneArray of token group documentation objects.
stylesstyleDoc[]at least oneArray of style documentation objects.
patternspatternDoc[]at least oneArray of pattern documentation objects.
descriptionrichTextoptional

Constraint: At least one of components, tokens, tokenGroups, styles, patterns must be present.

References: richText, componentDoc, tokenDoc, tokenGroupDoc, styleDoc, patternDoc
